ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
The default endpoint for the AI service. Leave this field blank to use the default OpenAI endpoint. 
         Otherwise provide an OpenAI API compatible endpoint. For example: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/
ast.target: AI服务的默认端点。将此字段留空以使用默认的OpenAI端点。\n         否则，请提供一个OpenAI API兼容的端点。例如：https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The API Key for accessing the AI endpoint.
ast.target: 用于访问AI端点的API密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name of language model to use.
ast.target: 要使用的语言模型名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Maximum number of tokens the AI can generate. This is a safety feature to prevent the AI from 
        running indefinitely. It also helps in managing costs.
ast.target: AI可以生成的最大令牌数。这是一个安全功能，可防止AI无限期运行。它也有助于管理成本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Each model calculates tokens differently. This setting controls how many characters can be sent 
        before a function call fails. This is not the same as token count, but is a safety measure to 
        prevent large amounts of text being sent and potentially large costs being incurred.
ast.target: 每个模型计算令牌的方式不同。此设置控制在函数调用失败之前可以发送多少字符。这与令牌计数不同，但是一项安全措施，\n        以防止发送大量文本并可能产生高额成本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Dumps detailed into to the console for debugging.
ast.target: 将详细信息转储到控制台以进行调试。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Displays the number of tokens used a notification on the desktop. Message format is prompt 
         tokens/completion tokens/total tokens. So it will look something like:  45/100/145.
ast.target: 在桌面上以通知形式显示使用的令牌数。消息格式为提示令牌/完成令牌/总令牌。因此它看起来像：45/100/145。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Displays the  number of tokens used a notification on the mobile.
ast.target: 在移动设备上以通知形式显示使用的令牌数。

ast.target: 请检查您的设置，确保API密钥、模型和端点有效。
